problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
